metadata.name: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth

sections.overview: Overview: About HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct GrowthHDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Dhruv Muchhal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹38,809.48Cr and the Latest NAV as of 19 Jun 2026 is ₹158.56. The HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year ;Investment Objective

sections.tax: Tax implications: Tax implicationIf you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.Check past data
